heading: Collection and reporting of child support enforcement data
label: 669 Collection and reporting of child support enforcement data

children.text: the number of cases in the caseload of the State agency administering the plan approved under this part in which the service is needed; and
the number of such cases in which the service has actually been provided.

children.heading: Types of services
children.label: b Types of services
children.text: The statistics required by subsection (a) shall be separately stated with respect to paternity establishment services and child support obligation establishment services.
recipients of assistance under a State program funded under part A or of payments or services under a State plan approved under part E; and
individuals who are not such recipients.

children.heading: Rule of interpretation
children.label: d Rule of interpretation
children.text: For purposes of subsection (a)(2), a service has actually been provided when the task described by the service has been accomplished.
